data.title: Gate.io will launch StakeStone (STO) spot trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch StakeStone (STO) spot trading at 18:30 (UTC+8) on April 3, 2025.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches STO
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official page, Binance Alpha has launched STO (StakeStone).

data.title: US Stablecoin Bill Committee Passed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News After 10 hours of debate, the U.S. House of Representatives Financial Services Committee passed the Stablecoin Act, which will establish a strict regulatory framework for payment stablecoins, requiring issuers to obtain federal or state approval and be backed by highly liquid assets 1:1.
Democratic lawmakers strongly criticized the Trump family's recently announced World Liberty Financial project for planning to issue stablecoin USD1. Representative Maxine Waters called it "a clear manifestation of greed and corruption" and questioned whether the president's push to relax crypto regulation while being involved in the industry constituted a conflict of interest.
Despite the controversy, the bill was supported by 6 Democratic lawmakers. Trump has promised to make the United States a "crypto superpower" and urged Congress to pass the Stablecoin Act and the Crypto Market Structure Act by the end of the year. The first hearing on the Market Structure Act is scheduled for April 9. (DLnews)

data.title: BitMart will launch StakeStone (STO)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch StakeStone (STO) at 18:30 (Eastern Time) on April 3, and the STO/USDT trading pair will be launched.
StakeStone is a decentralized liquidity infrastructure protocol designed to enhance the staking and liquidity distribution of blockchain networks. Our innovative solutions for staking assets such as ETH and BTC can achieve efficient liquidity redistribution while providing users with optimized returns.

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT  aand DOGE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.47, funding rate: 0.0054%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.88 , funding rate: 0.0092%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 5.01, funding rate: -0.0011%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.41, funding rate: -0.0019%.DOGE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 4.06, funding rate: 0.0043%.

data.title: Solana’s 24-hour DEX trading volume is currently reported at US$2.417 billion, ranking first among all chains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DefiLlama data shows that the 24-hour DEX transaction volume on Solana is temporarily reported to be US$2.417 billion, ranking first among all chains.

data.title: BitMart has launched GUN perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 50 times
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart has launched GUNZ (GUN) perpetual contract at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, 2025. At that time, the GUN/USDT trading pair will be opened with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
Gunzilla Games is a AAA game studio with its own GUNZ blockchain and flagship battle royale shooting game "Off The Grid"

data.title: UBS Predicts Federal Reserve Rate Cuts in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, UBS anticipates that the Federal Reserve will reduce interest rates by 75 to 100 basis points during the remainder of 2025. This forecast reflects expectations of monetary policy adjustments in response to evolving economic conditions.

data.title: First Digital: FDUSD is returning to the $1 anchor
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: FDUSD issuer First Digital said in a statement, "FDUSD market prices show signs of stabilization, and the latest data shows that it is gradually returning to the $1 anchor. As of the latest update, FDUSD is trading at about $0.99."
